misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing Keimola Golf with distinction. Known for his dedication to the AimPoint method for putting, Timo brings a scientific approach to the greens that sets him apart.

With 8 past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Timo's experience is undeniable. A formidable competitor, Timo has secured the coveted Hector Trophée on 3 occasions, marking him as one of the most successful players in the tournament's history. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him so far, Timo's consistent performance suggests that an individual title may well be within his reach.

As he prepares for his ninth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, Timo remains a player to watch. His strategic mind, combined with his mastery of putting, makes him a threat in both individual and pair formats. Off the course, Timo is known for his calm demeanor and willingness to share his knowledge, making him a respected figure among his peers.
